AR1.justification: The task was to write an observations.md entry; the agent staged the workspace and narrated conventions but never wrote the entry, so nothing was routed at all.

AR3.justification: No cross-references were introduced and the existing scaffold's relative reference to methodology.md#provenance-markers remains intact.

AR4.justification: Because no content was written, the workspace state is unchanged and trivially idempotent on re-run.
